case_title: MARLON OBREGON VS. PINNACLE PIPELINE INSPECTION, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF OBREGON, MARLON AS TO DEFENDANT PINNACLE PIPELINE INSPECTION, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
